title: calceolaria psammophila
intro: Calceolaria psammophila, also known as the sand slipper flower or sand slipper orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Calceolaria genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calceolaria psammophila include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of Calceolaria psammophila include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
